articles.summary: Fakhar Zaman has denied a charge of ball-tampering after his Pakistan Super League side Lahore Qalandars were handed a five-run penalty during a defeat to Karachi Kings.

articles.summary: National League side Woking appoint former Tottenham and England striker Jermain Defoe as their new head coach.

articles.summary: Bayern Munich wary of Saudi Pro League clubs targeting Harry Kane, Bernardo Silva set to leave Manchester City, Inter Miami start talks with Manchester United's Casemiro, plus more.

articles.title: Chelsea leave it late to win seven-goal thriller over Villa

articles.title: Brighton condemn Leicester City to seventh-straight league loss
articles.summary: A lone goal from Brighton's Kiko Seike is enough to condemn Leicester City to a seventh-straight loss in the WSL while Albion move up to sixth.

articles.summary: Oona Siren's stunning volley helps Women's Super League relegation battlers West Ham fight back to earn a point against London City Lionesses.

articles.summary: Igor Tudor leaves his role as Tottenham Hotspur interim head coach after just 44 days and seven matches.

articles.title: Korda topped by Kim again as South Korean wins for second straight week
articles.summary: Hyo Joo Kim repelled a challenge from Nelly Korda for the second straight week, pulling away around the turn and closing with a three-under 69 for a two-shot victory in the Ford Championship.
